TREATMENT RECOMMENDATION
WHY EUROHAIRLAB by DR. SCALP?
Early-stage hair loss is a progressive
biological condition driven by:
• Androgen sensitivity (DHT-induced
follicular shrinkage)
• Micro-inflammatory processes within
the scalp
• Reduced vascular and nutritional
support to the follicle
Window of Opportunity:
• Follicular activity is still preserved
• Responsiveness to treatment is at its
highest
• Reversibility remains clinically
achievable
CONDITION EXPLANATION
• Early regression in active follicles
(Anagen phase)
• Decreasing hair shaft diameter
• Suboptimal scalp environment

HAIR GROWTH
A Clinical-First Approach to Hair Restoration
EUROHAIRLAB by DR. SCALP is built on SCALPFIRST™ SYSTEM, a diagnostics-driven medical framework, ensuring that every
treatment is based on measurable scalp and follicular conditions-not assumptions or standardized packages.
RISK IF DELAYED TREATMENTS
• Reduced follicle activity
• Irreversible miniaturization
• Lower treatment responsiveness
20-Step Clinical Protocol for Hormonal Modulation &
Follicular Preservation.
Key Targets: Activates dermal papilla, stimulates growth
factors, extends Anagen phase.
13-Step Clinical Therapy for Sebum Regulation & Scalp
Homeostasis.
Key Targets: Activates dermal papilla, stimulates growth
factors, extends Anagen phase.
